team.name: customer_experience
team.header: Discussion and coordination for Customer Experience department
team.purpose: To strategize and improve customer experience for Lee's Market

team.name: product_sourcing
team.header: For discussions related to sourcing and quality control of products
team.purpose: To ensure the quality and origin of products

channel.name: customer_feedback
channel.header: Channel for sharing and discussing customer feedback
channel.purpose: To improve our service based on customer feedback

channel.name: local_sourcing
channel.header: Channel to discuss issues related to local sourcing
channel.purpose: To increase the percentage of locally sourced products

post.message: We've received some feedback about the layout of the Richmond store. Customers seem to be having trouble finding the dairy section. Any thoughts?
Interesting, Emily. Let's schedule a meeting to discuss potential changes to the store layout.
I've been in talks with a new supplier for our bakery section. They have some interesting products that could be a good fit.
That's great, John. Could you prepare a presentation on their offerings for our next team meeting?
We need to update our customer service training materials. Emily, could you take the lead on this?
Sure, Janet. I'll start working on it and keep you updated.
I've been reviewing our product display protocols. We may need to make some adjustments to accommodate the new bakery items.
Good point, John. Let's discuss this further in our next team meeting.

Hi team, I've just finished reviewing our 2025 product sourcing data. I've found that 19% of Lee's Market's total product portfolio was locally sourced within Canada last year. This reflects our procurement and supply strategy, as we've been trying to increase our support for local suppliers.
